description: Create a two-column content slide titled 'Does your risk operating model match today’s velocity?' with a comparison table on the left and a supporting image plus risk management notes on the right.

header.headline: Does your risk operating model match today’s velocity?

rows: US and retaliatory tariffs skyrocket in months...
AI models are retrained and launched in weeks...
...but model risk reviews and approvals take months
Extreme weather events disrupt operations overnight...

right.title: Risk Strategists are defined by their strategy-first approach that enables a trigger-based model

items.text: Note: Strategy-first approach shows the percent of respondents saying each statement describes their organization's approach to risk management.
items.sub: These data points are included in the segmentation used to identify Risk Strategists.

items.text: Trigger-based model shows the percent of respondents who have seen improvements in each area since 2020.
